description_long: This is a compact, two-story house with a simple rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior walls are light gray with prominent corner quoining, giving the structure a classic, sturdy appearance. The front facade features a centered wooden door accessed by a short set of steps with black railings, flanked by two symmetrically placed windows on each side, all with blue glass and brown muntins forming a cross pattern. The side and rear facades each have three evenly spaced windows per floor, maintaining a consistent and orderly window arrangement. The roof is flat and unadorned, with a slight lip around the edge. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A two-story, light gray house with a flat roof, symmetrical blue windows, and a central wooden door accessed by steps. The design is simple and classic, with prominent corner details and a clean, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, steps with railings, and four symmetrically placed windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying six evenly spaced windows in two rows, with no door or entry features.
description_view_2: Rear view with four windows arranged symmetrically, no entryway or steps visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with six windows in two rows and no entry features.
attribute_entryway_design: Centered wooden door with steps and black railings, no porch or overhang, flanked by symmetrical windows.
